## Meeting purpose

[Train attendees on using AI to accelerate SEO and content creation](https://fathom.video/share/Di21yV9wc15ZjC_icYSsJU-uFfRgDVBu?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [AI can dramatically speed up content creation and SEO optimization when used strategically](https://fathom.video/share/Di21yV9wc15ZjC_icYSsJU-uFfRgDVBu?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)
  - [Start by deeply understanding target audience and their intent, pain points, questions](https://fathom.video/share/Di21yV9wc15ZjC_icYSsJU-uFfRgDVBu?tab=summary&timestamp=2208.0)
  - [Use AI to generate high-quality outlines and first drafts, but still need human editors](https://fathom.video/share/Di21yV9wc15ZjC_icYSsJU-uFfRgDVBu?tab=summary&timestamp=7154.0)
  - [Continuously monitor, test, and iterate content to improve rankings](https://fathom.video/share/Di21yV9wc15ZjC_icYSsJU-uFfRgDVBu?tab=summary&timestamp=10264.0)
  - [AI is a tool to augment and accelerate, not fully replace, human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/Di21yV9wc15ZjC_icYSsJU-uFfRgDVBu?tab=summary&timestamp=16096.0)

## Topics

### Using AI for Audience Research

  - [Demonstrate using perplexity.ai and you.com to research target audience](https://fathom.video/share/Di21yV9wc15ZjC_icYSsJU-uFfRgDVBu?tab=summary&timestamp=2626.0)
  - [Prompt engineering to prime AI with audience context](https://fathom.video/share/Di21yV9wc15ZjC_icYSsJU-uFfRgDVBu?tab=summary&timestamp=7165.0)
  - [Generating lists of audience goals, questions, pain points, terminology](https://fathom.video/share/Di21yV9wc15ZjC_icYSsJU-uFfRgDVBu?tab=summary&timestamp=2760.0)
  - [Turning research into content topic ideas](https://fathom.video/share/Di21yV9wc15ZjC_icYSsJU-uFfRgDVBu?tab=summary&timestamp=2848.0)

### Keyword Research with AI Assistance

  - [Using SEMrush and Airtable to identify keyword opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/Di21yV9wc15ZjC_icYSsJU-uFfRgDVBu?tab=summary&timestamp=2619.0)
  - [Competitor keyword gap analysis](https://fathom.video/share/Di21yV9wc15ZjC_icYSsJU-uFfRgDVBu?tab=summary&timestamp=5420.0)
  - [Evaluating keyword difficulty vs search volume](https://fathom.video/share/Di21yV9wc15ZjC_icYSsJU-uFfRgDVBu?tab=summary&timestamp=5356.0)
  - [Identifying content refresh opportunities based on keyword rankings](https://fathom.video/share/Di21yV9wc15ZjC_icYSsJU-uFfRgDVBu?tab=summary&timestamp=5740.0)

### Building AI Content Workflows

  - [Intro to Airops for building content generation workflows](https://fathom.video/share/Di21yV9wc15ZjC_icYSsJU-uFfRgDVBu?tab=summary&timestamp=6460.0)
  - [Adapting an existing workflow template](https://fathom.video/share/Di21yV9wc15ZjC_icYSsJU-uFfRgDVBu?tab=summary&timestamp=13234.0)
  - [Key workflow steps: research, outlining, drafting, human review, publishing](https://fathom.video/share/Di21yV9wc15ZjC_icYSsJU-uFfRgDVBu?tab=summary&timestamp=7154.0)
  - [Generating FAQ content at scale from existing pages](https://fathom.video/share/Di21yV9wc15ZjC_icYSsJU-uFfRgDVBu?tab=summary&timestamp=11546.0)

### Continuous Content Optimization

  - [Importance of monitoring rankings and iterating](https://fathom.video/share/Di21yV9wc15ZjC_icYSsJU-uFfRgDVBu?tab=summary&timestamp=10264.0)
  - [Using AI to refresh and optimize existing content](https://fathom.video/share/Di21yV9wc15ZjC_icYSsJU-uFfRgDVBu?tab=summary&timestamp=11654.0)
  - [A/B testing titles, outlines, content](https://fathom.video/share/Di21yV9wc15ZjC_icYSsJU-uFfRgDVBu?tab=summary&timestamp=15152.0)
  - [Recovering traffic to declining pages](https://fathom.video/share/Di21yV9wc15ZjC_icYSsJU-uFfRgDVBu?tab=summary&timestamp=11735.0)
  - [Acquiring backlinks to AI-generated content](https://fathom.video/share/Di21yV9wc15ZjC_icYSsJU-uFfRgDVBu?tab=summary&timestamp=15464.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Attendees have access to all slides, notion docs, Slack community](https://fathom.video/share/Di21yV9wc15ZjC_icYSsJU-uFfRgDVBu?tab=summary&timestamp=16111.0)
  - [Start experimenting with the workflows and adapting them](https://fathom.video/share/Di21yV9wc15ZjC_icYSsJU-uFfRgDVBu?tab=summary&timestamp=16096.0)
  - [Stay engaged in the community for ongoing learning and support](https://fathom.video/share/Di21yV9wc15ZjC_icYSsJU-uFfRgDVBu?tab=summary&timestamp=16138.0)
